Name: ID
Description: Primary key

Name: AutomaticGenerateInvoiceDays
Description: Number of days before or after generating the subscription invoice. Company settings and automatic generate invoice type need to be enabled before subscription invoice generated automatically

Name: AutomaticGenerateInvoiceDescription
Description: Description of the automatic generated invoice

Name: AutomaticGenerateInvoiceType
Description: Type of automatic generate invoice: 1=Never, 2=Before the subscription period, 3=After the subscription period. Company settings need to be enabled before subscription invoice generated automatically

Name: AutomaticSendInvoiceDays
Description: Number of days after sending the subscription invoice. Company settings and automatic sending invoice type need to be enabled before subscription invoice sent automatically

Name: AutomaticSendInvoiceMethod
Description: Method of automatic send invoice: 1=Send based on account, 2=Send via email, 3=Create documents, 4=Send via digital postbox, 5=Send and track, 6=Send via peppol. Company settings need to be enabled before subscription invoice sent automatically

Name: AutomaticSendInvoiceSender
Description: Sender's email of automatic send invoice: 1=Company email address, 2=Main user email address. Company settings need to be enabled before subscription invoice sent automatically

Name: AutomaticSendInvoiceSenderMailbox
Description: ID of automatic send invoice sender's mailbox. Company settings need to be enabled before subscription invoice sent automatically

Name: AutomaticSendInvoiceType
Description: Type of automatic send invoice: 1=Never, 2=When available. Company settings need to be enabled before subscription invoice sent automatically

Name: CancellationPeriod
Description: Cancellation period of subscription type

Name: CancellationPeriodUnit
Description: Unit of cancellation period: wk=Week, mm=Month, yy=Year, hy=Half-year, qt=Quarter

Name: Code
Description: Code

Name: Created
Description: Date and time when the subscription type was created

Name: Creator
Description: ID of user that created the subscription type

Name: CreatorFullName
Description: Full name of user that created the subscription type

Name: CustomField
Description: Custom field endpoint. Provided only for the Exact Online Premium users.

Name: Description
Description: Description of subscription type

Name: Division
Description: Division code

Name: EnablePaymentLink
Description: Enable payment link: 0=Never, 1=Always, 2=Based on account

Name: InvoiceCorrectionMethod
Description: Invoice correction method: 1=Ratio based, 2=Zero Invoice, 3=Never invoiced

Name: InvoicePeriod
Description: Invoice period of subscription type

Name: InvoicePeriodUnit
Description: Unit of invoice period: wk=Week, mm=Month, yy=Year, hy=Half-year, qt=Quarter

Name: ManualRenewalMethod
Description: Manual renewal method: 1=Use item prices, 2=Use current subscription prices

Name: Modified
Description: Last modified date of subscription type

Name: Modifier
Description: ID of user that modified the subscription type

Name: ModifierFullName
Description: Full name of user that modified the subscription type

Name: Notes
Description: Additional information about subscription type

Name: ProlongationType
Description: Prolongation type: 0=No, 1=Manual, 2=Automatic

Name: RenewalCancellationPeriod
Description: Renewal cancellation period of subscription type

Name: RenewalCancellationPeriodUnit
Description: Unit of renewal cancellation period: wk=Week, mm=Month, yy=Year, hy=Half-year, qt=Quarter

Name: RenewalPeriod
Description: Renewal period of subscription type

Name: RenewalPeriodUnit
Description: Unit of renewal period: wk=Week, mm=Month, yy=Year, hy=Half-year, qt=Quarter

Name: SubscriptionPeriod
Description: Subscription period of subscription type

Name: SubscriptionPeriodUnit
Description: Unit of subscription period: wk=Week, mm=Month, yy=Year, hy=Half-year, qt=Quarter
